subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Covenant! Thy letter dated 23 Rabi'u'th-Thani 1337, addressed to the Afnán Áqá Mírzá Muḥsin [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان نامه که بتاریخ ۲۳ ربیع الاخر ۱۳۳۷ بافنان آقا میرزا محسن مرقوم
subcodes.subjects: @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization
